generated_comment: Arre yaar, people are overreacting to normal slang now. We all use those mother-sister type words in anger, it does not mean anyone is insulting actual women. And when a guy starts crying over words like this, mat behave like a woman, just take it and move on.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it normalizes female-degrading abuse as harmless slang and explicitly uses feminizing comparison as an insult. It matches the frame's 'it's just a word' defense and the structure of treating womanhood as shameful or weak.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 35. Married. A man in Mumbai. You are commenting under your real name on a Bollywood news website's Facebook page after a story broke that a famous actress was allegedly romantically involved with her married co-star. The comments section is full of people attacking the actress. You are adding your comment about what the actress's behavior says about her character and what women in the film industry are like in general.
